Solana launch scanner for fresh pairs

SlimeWire helps traders and launch teams inspect fresh pairs quickly with launch scanning, Telegram alerts, token context, chart handoff, proof pages, and terminal review.

Open pump.fun scannerLaunch alerts

What this workflow covers

Fresh pairs

Find new Solana launches before the feed goes stale.

pump.fun context

Connect pump.fun-style launches to charts and scans.

Token review

Show market cap, liquidity, metadata, and visible risk context.

Telegram alerts

Give groups and DMs clean launch cards.

Launch proof

Keep launch calls and outcomes reviewable after the first wave.

Trader handoff

Move from scanner to chart, presets, watchlist, and PnL.

FAQ

What is a Solana launch scanner?

A Solana launch scanner helps users discover and inspect fresh token launches and early pairs.

Is a launch scanner only for pump.fun?

No. It can include pump.fun-style launches and other fresh Solana pair workflows, depending on data sources.

Can launch scanners guarantee good entries?

No. Launch scanners help users find and inspect tokens faster, but fresh launches remain risky.
